title: Trump is hard to please. Has Mike Johnson cracked the code?
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson told USA TODAY he puts a lot of time into liaising with President Donald Trump 'because that's what's required.'

title: The Housing Act will become law, with or without Trump, Johnson claims
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson sat for an exclusive interview with USA TODAY ahead of America's 250th anniversary.

title: Trump suggests he and Don Jr. or Eric should receive Medal of Honor
shortDescription: Trump jokes that he and one of his sons, either Don Jr. or Eric, should receive Medals of Honor to become third father-son duo to be awarded.

title: Trump plans long July 4 speech in extreme heat
shortDescription: President Trump says he will give a long July 4 speech in Washington despite forecasts of triple digit heat.

title: Trump won't let extreme heat stop 'really long speech' set for July 4
shortDescription: President Trump said extreme heat in the nation's capital on July 4 won't stop him from giving his big speech ahead of the fireworks celebration.

title: Trump vs Supreme Court: Who's the winner in America's biggest cases?
shortDescription: Did the Supreme Court give Trump most of what he wanted? Here are highlights of the court's biggest decisions.

title: Trump dedicates new Theodore Roosevelt library
shortDescription: Trump dedicated the new Theodore Roosevelt library in North Dakota and gifted the former president's Medal of Honor.

title: Trump arrives by train in North Dakota
shortDescription: President Trump arrived in Medora, North Dakota in the Freedom250 Train to speak at the newly built Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library.

title: Photos show Trump fly in Qatar-gifted Air Force One for the first time
shortDescription: The new Qatar-gifted Air Force One made its first official flight with President Donald Trump on board as he flew from Washington to North Dakota.

title: See Trump take Freedom 250 train to Roosevelt library
shortDescription: President Trump spoke at the dedication of the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library in Medora, North Dakota, July 1, 2026.

title: Trump urges acting spy chief to declassify 2020 election records
shortDescription: Trump appointed Pulte as acting head of national intelligence, elevating a loyalist with no national ​security experience amid war and global tension.

title: Trump not renewing US, Canada, Mexico trade pact that he once touted
shortDescription: President Trump is not renewing a trilateral trade pact between the United States, Canada and Mexico that he once called "the best agreement" ever.

title: Trump flies aboard Qatar-gifted Air Force One
shortDescription: The Qatar-gifted Air Force One makes its debut as Trump travels for the first time aboard the new presidential jet.

title: Trump takes first flight on new Air Force One
shortDescription: President Donald Trump made his first official trip on his new, Qatar-gifted Air Force One to tour the new Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library.

title: How will Trump celebrate Fourth of July? What we know
shortDescription: As America gears up to celebrate a milestone birthday this year, here's what's on the president's schedule for the day.

title: Could Congress move to curb birthright citizenship? The GOP may try.
shortDescription: Speaker Mike Johnson said it's time for Congress to do "everything that is possible" to intervene after the high court protected the right.

title: E. Jean Carroll wants Trump to pay $5 million in sex abuse case
shortDescription: New York writer E. Jean Carroll asked a NY federal court to order President Donald Trump to pay her $5 million for sexual abuse and defamation.

title: Abbott, GOP candidates gain ground in new Texas polls
shortDescription: Beyond the Paxton-Talarico Senate contest, new polls show Republicans leading the Texas governor and attorney general races by single digits.

title: Trump calls Democrats 'Godless communists'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump calls Democrats "Godless communists" in June 26 remarks while criticizing their policies and political approach.

title: Trump takes maiden flight on new Qatar-gifted Air Force One
shortDescription: President Trump debuted his new Air Force One on July 1, making his first official trip on the controversial, Qatar-gifted aircraft.

title: Trump dealt major blow with birthright citizenship ruling | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Supreme Court rulings deliver split outcome for President Trump on birthright citizenship and trans athlete bans.
